name: Generate Image
description: Generate images using OpenAI DALL-E API. Creates images from text prompts with configurable model, size, and quality settings.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate

model.description: OpenAI DALL-E model to use (default: dall-e-3)

quality.description: Image quality (default: standard). Options: standard, hd

style.description: Image style (default: vivid). Options: vivid, natural
